sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Tiger attack helicopter with hover capability. Described as slower craft suitable for bullet visibility and strategic route planning.

special_mechanics.name: Missile Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Short-range missiles that can hit both air and ground targets

special_mechanics.name: Bomb Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Destroys any enemy and their bullets within range when fired. Detonates automatically if hit by enemy bullets.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Tiger-Heli is a vertically scrolling shmup with helicopter flight mechanics. No quantitative physics parameters (gravity, velocity, acceleration values) are documented in available sources. Movement is qualitatively described as slower and suitable for strategic planning rather than fast-paced action. Game focuses on weapon mechanics (missiles and bombs) rather than character movement physics.
